product_results.title: JETech Matte Case for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch, Shockproof Military Grade Drop Protection, Frosted Translucent Back Phone Cover, Anti-Fingerprint (Black)

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be of good quality with a premium look. The case protects the phone effectively and provides a perfect fit. Users appreciate its durable construction and decent appearance. The case offers good value for money and has an appealing tactile feel. However, customers have mixed opinions about the grip it provides.

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: Good quality phone case. Looks great as well. The edges are silicone so protects the phone from any damage.
authors_reviews.author: Jasleen Thukral

authors_reviews.title: Great quality!
authors_reviews.text: Great quality as always, I have bought many of these case’s for all mine and my family’s phones. Swear by this!
authors_reviews.author: Nate Fowler

authors_reviews.title: Excellent case and camera protector
authors_reviews.text: I recommend this case . Nice feel, not slippery, nice rubber feel, no stinky, you can feel the quality and a true camera case protector. You can feel it will protect fone from drops and will not break at anytime or any height
authors_reviews.author: MalcolmSuperstar

authors_reviews.title: Look good. Work good.
authors_reviews.text: These look good and protect from falls. They show the apple slightly on the back which I think is cool.They fit perfect and the button holes are spot on.Recommend to purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Douglas B.

authors_reviews.title: Love it
authors_reviews.text: One of the best cases that I have
authors_reviews.author: Liam

authors_reviews.title: Doesn’t not protect like it should!!
authors_reviews.text: I bought this case because I liked the design and had one on my previous phone. I got this one for my new iPhone 16 Pro a few months ago, and today, while cleaning the phone and case, I noticed that my iPhone has paint chips all around the screen! The case didn’t protect it at all like it should have! I’m really upset that this happened since I take very good care of all my phones and trusted this case.
authors_reviews.author: Stephan
